_meta.description: Master assumption registry for the DCF valuation platform. Documents every model input: its derivation method, source hierarchy, confidence scoring, editability, validation bounds, and last-updated timestamp. Runtime instances should populate 'runtimeValue' and 'runtimeSource' fields for each assumption.

erp.label: Equity Risk Premium
erp.sourceDetail: Damodaran implied ERP — January 2025. Update annually from pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar
erp.notes: Applied globally to all cost-of-equity computations. Single value — not ticker-specific.

vtsTheory.label: Value of Tax Shield Theory
vtsTheory.notes: Fernandez 2007 assumes debt rebalanced to target D/E each period (most public companies). Must match betaLeveringFormula.

betaLeveringFormula.label: Beta Levering Formula
betaLeveringFormula.notes: Must stay in sync with vtsTheory. Divergence causes leverage cost double-counting.

rfRate.label: Risk-Free Rate (10Y Treasury Yield)
rfRate.description: 10-year US Treasury yield used as the risk-free rate in CAPM.

sourceHierarchy.condition: both APIs fail — RISK: stale rate, no alerting

knownRisks: Fallback 0.0429 is hardcoded and silently returns stale data if both APIs fail with no error surfaced to UI
rfRate.recommendedFix: Log a warning or surface a banner when the fallback value is used; consider caching last-known-good rate in Supabase.

beta.label: Levered Beta
beta.description: Systematic risk of the stock relative to the market, derived from 5-year weekly regression against SPY.
knownRisks: 5Y weekly uses end-of-week prices; IPOs < 5y default to Yahoo beta without disclosure
No Vasicek/Blume adjustment (raw OLS beta is noisy for illiquid stocks)
beta.recommendedFix: Apply Vasicek shrinkage β_adj = 0.67×β_OLS + 0.33×1.0 for small-cap stocks; surface confidence interval to user.

crp.label: Country Risk Premium
crp.description: Additional risk premium for companies domiciled in emerging/frontier markets.

sourceHierarchy.condition: currency not in table — e.g. new or unlisted EM currencies

knownRisks: Table uses reporting currency as proxy for country — a USD-reporting EM company may have zero CRP
Fallback 1% is less than many real EM premiums (Nigeria 8.9%, Ukraine 8.9%)
crp.recommendedFix: Key CRP on exchange country code from Yahoo summaryProfile.country, not reporting currency.

costOfDebt.label: Pre-Tax Cost of Debt
costOfDebt.description: Effective interest rate on total debt, used in after-tax cost of debt calculation.
costOfDebt.formula: kd = interestExpense / avgGrossDebt; after-tax kd = kd × (1 - taxRate)

sourceHierarchy.source: Income statement: interestExpense / totalDebt (both in reporting currency — rate is FX-independent)

knownRisks: Cap at 15% may understate cost for distressed companies (HY bonds at 20%+)
Synthetic spread of 1.5% is flat across all credit ratings — ignores credit quality
costOfDebt.recommendedFix: Use Damodaran's default spread table (keyed by interest coverage ratio) for fallback.

taxRate.label: Effective Tax Rate
taxRate.description: Effective corporate tax rate used to compute after-tax cost of debt and NOPAT.

sourceHierarchy.condition: income statement data unavailable or non-positive

knownRisks: Single-year effective rate can be distorted by one-time deferred tax items
Previous version had ceiling of 0.55 (changed to 0.40 in a prior session — commit in git log)
taxRate.recommendedFix: Use 3-year average effective tax rate to reduce single-year noise.

debtToEquity.label: Debt-to-Equity Ratio
debtToEquity.description: Market-value D/E used for WACC capital structure weights.
debtToEquity.formula: D/E = totalDebt / marketCap; debtWeight = D/E / (1 + D/E)
knownRisks: Financial sector: capped at D/E ≤ 1.5 using longTermDebt only (deposit liabilities excluded)
FX conversion applied to debt but not to marketCap — correct behavior for ADRs, but must verify for dual-listed companies
Default 0.30 for marketCap=0 is ungrounded — should surface an error instead

specialCases.financialSector: Uses longTermDebt only; hard cap at D/E ≤ 1.5 to prevent deposit liabilities from inflating leverage

cagr.label: Revenue/Earnings CAGR
cagr.description: Blended annual growth rate applied over the DCF projection period.
cagr.formula: blended = wAnalyst×analyst1y + wFundamental×(ROE×retention) + wHistorical×hist3y + wTTM×earningsGrowth; convergenceDiscount applied above 20%; sizeCap applied by revenue tier

sourceHierarchy.source: Fundamental growth (ROE × retention ratio) — Damodaran retention model
Historical 3Y revenue/NI CAGR from income statements

cagr.convergenceDiscount: Excess above 20% discounted by 25% (Damodaran mean-reversion). rawBlended > 0.20 → blended = 0.20 + (rawBlended - 0.20) × 0.75

specialCases.foreignCurrency: Historical CAGR zeroed out (inflation-distorted local currency); weight shifted to analyst+fundamental
specialCases.financialSector: Uses net income CAGR (not revenue CAGR — bank revenues distorted by rate cycles)

knownRisks: Analyst estimates from Yahoo earningsTrend may lag consensus by days
foreignCurrency detection uses reportingCurrency, not company domicile — may miss USD-reporting EM companies
No cross-stock consistency enforcement — same ticker may get different CAGR in different sessions
cagr.recommendedFix: Persist blended CAGR in Supabase valuations table at fetch time; flag drift > 3% on re-load.

terminalG.label: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalG.description: Perpetual growth rate beyond the explicit projection period (Gordon Growth terminal value).
terminalG.formula: TV = FCF_n × (1 + terminalG) / (WACC - terminalG); hard constraint: terminalG < WACC
knownRisks: Gordon Growth violation (terminalG ≥ WACC) propagates null EV correctly, but UI may show '—' without clear explanation to user
2.5% cap may be too low for EM companies where nominal GDP growth is 5–7%
terminalG.recommendedFix: Surface Gordon Growth violation as an explicit user-facing error with suggested fix (lower terminalG or raise WACC).

baseFCF.label: Base Free Cash Flow
baseFCF.description: Starting FCF (in USD millions) for the DCF projection, representing normalized earnings power.
knownRisks: OCF × 0.6 is a rough approximation with no theoretical basis — CapEx-intensity varies hugely by sector
2% revenue margin seed produces widely different FCF across industries
normalizedNetIncome for financial sector uses only last 2 years — insufficient for cyclical banks
baseFCF.recommendedFix: For negative FCF companies, compute normalized FCF as median of 5-year FCF history (if available) rather than ratio-based seed.

wacc.label: Weighted Average Cost of Capital
wacc.description: Blended discount rate used for present value calculations in FCFF DCF.
wacc.formula: WACC = (E/V) × Ke + (D/V) × Kd × (1 - T); Ke = rfRate + β × (ERP + CRP); Kd_after_tax = costOfDebt × (1 - taxRate)
knownRisks: No Hamada equation for beta re-levering when user changes D/E assumption
Capital structure uses current-period D/E rather than target D/E — can be distorted in leveraged buyout or recapitalization years
wacc.recommendedFix: Implement Hamada re-levering so that changing D/E in UI propagates correctly to beta and cost of equity.

projectionYears.label: Explicit Projection Years
projectionYears.description: Length of the DCF projection horizon before terminal value.
projectionYears.notes: Standard for long-term DCF. Three-stage model splits this into two 5-year windows with linear fade in stage 2.

growthModel.label: DCF Growth Model
growthModel.description: Whether to use flat CAGR (two-stage) or linearly fading CAGR in years 6–10 (three-stage/Damodaran fade).
growthModel.derivationLogic: three-stage used for high-growth companies (CAGR > 15%); two-stage for standard/mature

cash.label: Cash & Equivalents
cash.description: Added to EV in the equity bridge: equityValue = EV + cash - debt.
knownRisks: Uses single most-recent quarter balance sheet — not TTM average
Silent zero if missing (no error surfaced)

totalDebt.label: Total Debt
totalDebt.description: Subtracted from EV in the equity bridge. FX-converted for non-USD reporting currencies.

sourceHierarchy.source: bs0.longTermDebt × fxRate (financial sector — excludes deposit liabilities)

knownRisks: FX rate from getFXRate() silently returns 1.0 (parity) if all currency pair lookups fail — will produce wrong equity bridge for non-USD companies with no error
totalDebt.recommendedFix: getFXRate() must throw or return null on API failure, not silently return 1.0. Caller should surface FX warning in UI.

fxRate.label: FX Rate (reportingCurrency → USD)
fxRate.description: Conversion factor applied to balance sheet and income statement figures reported in non-USD currency.
knownRisks: Silent parity fallback produces correct-looking but wrong valuations for foreign companies. ARS/USD ≈ 900:1, so parity fallback overstates equity value by ~900×.
fxRate.recommendedFix: Return null on failure; caller in api/financials/route.ts must surface 'FX data unavailable' error and abort valuation computation.

exitMultiple.label: Exit Multiple (FCF Multiple)
exitMultiple.description: Alternative terminal value approach: TV = FCF_n × exitMultiple. Not used in primary computation — shown as cross-check.
knownRisks: Sector defaults are not anchored to Damodaran industry data — hardcoded constants with no update mechanism
No peer-set median computation
exitMultiple.recommendedFix: Compute from Damodaran industry EV/EBIT or EV/FCF median for the ticker's sector.

ebitMargin.label: EBIT Margin (by year)
ebitMargin.description: Operating income as a percentage of revenue for each projected year. Used in detailed FCFF build-up.
ebitMargin.formula: median(historicalEbitMargins) + slight annual expansion of +0.2% per year, capped at 115% of base

sourceHierarchy.source: 3-year median of historical EBIT margins from income statements

knownRisks: Linear expansion (+0.2%/yr) is applied regardless of sector — inappropriate for capital-intensive cyclical industries
115% ceiling on margin expansion is generous for mature companies

capexPctRevenue.label: CapEx as % of Revenue
capexPctRevenue.description: Capital expenditure intensity, used to compute FCFF from EBIT in detailed projection.

sourceHierarchy.source: 3-year median of historical capex/revenue from cash flow statements

knownRisks: 3Y median may not reflect inflection in capex cycle (e.g. AI infrastructure build-out for hyperscalers)

dnaPctRevenue.label: D&A as % of Revenue
dnaPctRevenue.description: Depreciation & amortization intensity used in FCFF projection to compute EBITDA from EBIT.

nwcPctRevChange.label: ΔNWC as % of ΔRevenue
nwcPctRevChange.description: Change in net working capital as a fraction of revenue change. Affects cash conversion in detailed FCFF model.
knownRisks: NWC can be negative (negative cash conversion cycle for Amazon-type retailers) — median may smooth over important structural patterns

dividendPerShare.label: Dividend Per Share (TTM)
dividendPerShare.description: Annual dividend used in DDM computation. Required for DDM applicability.
dividendPerShare.formula: DDM: P = D1 / (Ke - g); D1 = dividendPerShare × (1 + g)

triangulationWeights.label: Model Triangulation Weights
triangulationWeights.description: Percentage weights applied to each valuation method when computing the blended triangulated fair value.
knownRisks: Weights are hardcoded in engine.ts fallback — actual weights come from pre-computed adapter data which may differ
No transparency to user about how weight is computed or which method dominated
triangulationWeights.recommendedFix: Expose effectiveWeights breakdown in ValuationSummary component.

scenarioAdjustments.label: Bull/Base/Bear Scenario Adjustments
scenarioAdjustments.description: Fixed deltas applied to WACC, CAGR, and terminal growth for scenario analysis.
knownRisks: Flat ±1% WACC / ±2% CAGR deltas don't reflect actual uncertainty — a startup may have CAGR uncertainty of ±20%
Scenarios don't account for correlation between WACC and CAGR (high-rate environment suppresses growth)
scenarioAdjustments.recommendedFix: Make scenario deltas proportional to CAGR confidence level.

piotroski_f_score.label: Piotroski F-Score
piotroski_f_score.description: Financial health score 0–9 based on 9 binary signals across profitability, leverage/liquidity, and operating efficiency.
piotroski_f_score.sourceFields: ROA, CFO, ΔROA, accruals, leverage change, current ratio change, shares issued, gross margin change, asset turnover change
piotroski_f_score.nullHandling: explicit null propagation — each of the 9 tests returns null when data unavailable, not 0

altman_z_score.label: Altman Z-Score
altman_z_score.nullHandling: returns null when balance sheet data unavailable
knownRisks: Original 1968 model calibrated on manufacturing firms — less reliable for asset-light tech companies

beneish_m_score.label: Beneish M-Score
beneish_m_score.description: Earnings manipulation detection model. M > -1.78 flags potential manipulation.
beneish_m_score.nullHandling: requires 2 years of history — returns null for single-year data

historicalPriceClose.description: Close price from Yahoo historical endpoint used in beta regression and price chart.
knownRisks: Silent zero substitution when both close and adjClose are missing. Produces incorrect beta if any date has a 0 price.
historicalPriceClose.recommendedFix: Filter out rows where close === 0 before passing to regression.
